description_long: This is a medium-sized, spiral-bound sketchbook with a dark brown cover and prominent red plastic or rubber rings along the spine. The front cover features a bold, stylized illustration of a humanoid robot rendered in white line art, giving it a mechanical and futuristic appearance. The cover also displays large, blocky text in a light gray color, partially overlaying the illustration. The edges of the pages are visible, showing a cream or off-white color, and the book appears to be relatively thin. The corners of the cover are rounded, and the overall design is modern and urban, suitable for creative or artistic use. The book's surface has a matte finish, and the materials suggest durability for everyday handling.
description: A dark brown, spiral-bound sketchbook with a robot illustration and bold gray text on the cover, featuring red rings and rounded corners. The design is modern and urban, with a matte finish and visible cream-colored pages.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the red spiral rings and the thickness of the cream-colored pages.
description_view_1: The front cover is visible, showcasing the robot illustration and bold gray text, with the red spiral rings on the left.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite side, showing the full width of the cover and the red rings along the top edge.
description_view_3: The back cover is partially visible, with the red spiral rings on the right and a small logo in the lower left corner.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a detailed white line drawing of a humanoid robot, depicted in a mechanical and angular style. The illustration is bold and technical, occupying much of the cover and giving a futuristic, industrial feel.
attribute_spine_design: The spine consists of a series of red spiral rings, with no visible text or decorative elements. The design is functional and modern, emphasizing the spiral binding.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small white logo is visible in the lower left corner of the front cover, featuring stylized letters and a geometric design.
